title: Direct deal writes bypass canonical publish eligibility
impact: Ineligible owners can publish active deals outside the reviewed path
root_cause: Final RLS checks ownership only while live defaults and stronger checks live elsewhere
recommended_fix: Enforce one atomic database-authoritative publish transition and deny direct live-state writes
verification_test: Attempt direct REST publication for every ineligible/cross-owner state and require denial with no row change

title: Pending or unverified businesses are publicly discoverable
surface: Public browse map search and RPC
impact: Unapproved or impersonating business contact/location data can appear publicly
root_cause: Public grants and RPCs lack one approved-active-verified lifecycle predicate
recommended_fix: Apply one public-business predicate to RLS RPCs joins shares and fallbacks
verification_test: Query every lifecycle/location fixture anonymously through all public paths and require only safe approved rows

title: Shared client-embedded business invite is not a secure gate
impact: Arbitrary users can open merchant applications and compound discovery/publication weaknesses
root_cause: Reusable authority is shipped in the untrusted client
recommended_fix: Use scoped expiring server-issued invitations or reviewed open applications
verification_test: Inspect bundle and attempt reuse expiry cross-user and direct-insert cases; only one safe pending application may result

title: Claim and release paths ignore redemption grace
impact: A still-redeemable claim can be expired and a second logical claim allowed
root_cause: Expiration semantics are duplicated and disagree with the shared grace rule
recommended_fix: Centralize effective expiration across claim release redeem wallet cleanup and reads
verification_test: Exercise exact nominal/grace boundaries and parallel claim/release/redeem; require one valid atomic outcome

title: Checkout trusts client-controlled source and price
impact: An owner can initiate an unsupported charge and later receive no entitlement
root_cause: Untrusted request selectors override the server product and bypass a purchase-surface check
recommended_fix: Resolve allowlisted price mode and environment solely on the server
verification_test: In Stripe test mode forge source and price values; no Session may contain a caller-selected price

title: Billing token consumption is non-atomic
impact: Concurrent replay can create multiple Checkout Sessions
root_cause: Token count read and update are separate without a conditional atomic consume
recommended_fix: Consume in one conditional RPC/update and require exactly one returned row
verification_test: Send synchronized requests with one token; exactly one may consume/create a Session

title: Expo Doctor fails native dependency checks
impact: Duplicate React Native and an unverified New Architecture module threaten build/runtime reliability
root_cause: Installed dependency graph is not SDK-54-clean
recommended_fix: Resolve through Expo-supported versions and validate the launch-arguments dependency
verification_test: Clean install then require one compatible React Native and passing Doctor/Metro/debug/approved build smoke

title: Business onboarding mobile checks fail
impact: Mobile conversion/accessibility suffers and release checks mix stale and real failures
root_cause: Missing jump/layout affordance plus obsolete assertion contract
recommended_fix: Approve current copy add accessible jump correct mobile layout and align tests
verification_test: Run both website checks and keyboard/screen-reader/small-viewport navigation; all must pass

title: Share landing never resolves deal or status
impact: Recipients cannot identify offers and invalid/expired states are indistinguishable
root_cause: Static page never calls the available safe lookup
recommended_fix: Use a narrow state-aware lookup and safe preview with app/store fallback
verification_test: Open valid expired redeemed disabled missing and malformed fixtures; show only approved fields and correct states

title: Website has no store download destinations
impact: Visitors cannot reach official app listings
root_cause: Both configured store URLs are null pending listings
recommended_fix: Add approved listing URLs and verify every CTA/deep-link fallback
verification_test: Check every CTA on iOS Android and desktop against official package listings

title: Local Auth config conflicts with locked requirements
impact: Dev behavior can mask confirmation/password defects; hosted impact is unknown
root_cause: Local confirmation and password settings diverge from locked product policy
recommended_fix: Align local settings and verify hosted Auth configuration read-only
verification_test: Compare settings then test unconfirmed login resend weak password reset expiry/replay and secure change

title: Source-of-truth docs and release checks are stale
impact: Operators can act on false state while stale gates obscure real failures
root_cause: Hand-maintained versions flags counts and copy assertions drift from code/deployment
recommended_fix: Generate inventories from source and reconcile current docs/checkers
verification_test: In clean CI compare generated version flags migrations functions and approved copy; injected drift must fail

title: Unmanaged legacy AI function is active remotely
affected_users: Businesses platform operators and AI data subjects
impact: Live AI auth data prompt cost and error behavior cannot be reviewed or reproduced
root_cause: An old deployed function has no authoritative source directory in the current repository
recommended_fix: Identify callers/source then retire or restore review tests safeguards and lock approval
verification_test: Desired-vs-hosted inventory must match; retained function passes auth quota fact privacy and fallback tests

title: Moderate transitive dependency advisories
impact: Potential build/runtime exposure; automatic suggested fix is breaking
root_cause: Transitive postcss and uuid ranges contain reported moderate advisories
recommended_fix: Assess reachability and upgrade through supported Expo dependency paths
verification_test: Re-run production audit plus native/bundle tests with no reachable unresolved advisory

title: Public admin shell exposes internal information architecture
impact: Low-risk reconnaissance despite no demonstrated data or privilege leak
root_cause: Static signed-out route renders the full internal navigation shell
recommended_fix: Render a minimal noindex signed-out shell while retaining server authorization
verification_test: Open signed out and verify minimal shell/no data; every function remains 401 without session

title: Monitoring and alert evidence is incomplete
impact: Critical regressions may be customer-reported before operators are alerted
root_cause: First-party events exist but complete hosted signals alerts ownership and runbooks are not evidenced
recommended_fix: Define privacy-safe signals alerts retention ownership and incident drills
verification_test: Trigger synthetic failures for auth claims billing AI jobs push and require timely redacted alerts
